ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly legible.
certificate.issuing_authority: West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg

invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, high quality, all fields clearly legible.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-25D-421343 does not contain an LC reference. The remarks field contains '7200226916' which is a shipment number, not an LC reference.

occurrences_in_invoice_files.context: Company logo/branding at top of invoice
VAT No: SE556056625801, Tax rep: EAB, Reg. office: Ericsson AB, Stockholm, Sweden, Reg.Number:5560566258
Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'ERICSSON AB' found explicitly in invoice header branding and footer address blocks with full address matching certificate.

criteria_met: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' identified in invoice (header branding and footer address blocks)
Consignee 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC' identified in invoice 'Invoice to' field
Shipment number '7200226916' matches between certificate remarks and invoice
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor found in invoice, consignee found in invoice, and shipment reference matches. Valid document pair.

consignor.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'ERICSSON AB' anywhere in invoice files
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - 'Ericsson AB' appears in invoice header branding, footer left block (VAT registration), and footer center block (full address: Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN)

comparison_steps.description: Verify country SWEDEN from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice footer center block explicitly states 'SWEDEN'. Additionally, VAT No SE556056625801 has SE prefix confirming Sweden (4.1.2.1).

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and header
Country verification via VAT prefix SE confirming Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ERICSSON AB, TORSHAMNSGATAN 23, 164 80, STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer identified in footer block: 'Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN'. Name match: 'ERICSSON AB' = 'Ericsson AB' after case normalization. Address match: Torshamnsgatan 23, 164 80 Stockholm matches S-164 80 STOCKHOLM (S- prefix is postal format variation). Country: SWEDEN explicitly stated in invoice footer. VAT: SE556056625801 confirms Sweden via SE prefix. Full match on name, address, and country.

consignee.certificate_value: VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA
consignee.invoice_value: VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has 'Invoice to' field: VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA. This is the authoritative consignee field per 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC' with invoice 'Invoice to' name 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC'
comparison_steps.result: Exact match after case normalization: 'viva armenia cjsc' = 'viva armenia cjsc'

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee country 'ARMENIA' with invoice 'Invoice to' country 'ARMENIA'

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - Invoice to field used as authoritative consignee field

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA'. Invoice 'Invoice to' field: 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA'. Exact match on company name, address, and country. The invoice also has a 'Consignee/Ship to' field at a different address (ARARATYAN ST 62/23, 0043 YEREVAN) and a 'Customer/Sold to' field at the same address as the certificate. Per 4.2.0.2, the 'Invoice to' field has priority and matches exactly. The different Ship to address does not affect the result per 4.2.4.

goods_description.certificate_value:
TELECOM EQUIPMENT
CN - Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m
CN - Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
CN - Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
goods_description.invoice_value:
Telecommunication equipment (Goods Marking)
Line 1: Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m
Line 2: Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
Line 3: Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m

comparison_steps.description: Determine verification priority. Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (the CN prefix is a country-of-origin code, not an article number). Invoice contains Product Numbers (KRE1012408/2, RPM629551/3, RPM629552/3) but these are not referenced in the certificate. Therefore Priority 2 (controlled text matching) applies.

Certificate general description: 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice Goods Marking: 'Telecommunication equipment'. Certificate line items: (1) 'Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m', (2) 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m', (3) 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'
comparison_steps.result: Each certificate line item has an identity-bearing main designation that can be identified in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'. Invoice line 2: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'
Certificate: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'. Invoice line 3: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'

Certificate general description: 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice Goods Marking: 'Telecommunication equipment'. 'TELECOM' is a widely recognized abbreviation of 'Telecommunication'. Both refer to the same product category.
comparison_steps.result: 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' vs 'Telecommunication equipment' — 'Telecom' is a standard abbreviation of 'Telecommunication'. The identity-bearing main designation 'EQUIPMENT' is identical. This is a standard commercial abbreviation, not a semantic interpretation. All three individual line items match exactly, confirming this is the same goods consignment.
comparison_steps.conclusion: MATCH - the general description is consistent and all line items match exactly

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation identified and matched for all three line items
Non-identity-bearing additions - 'CN -' prefix in certificate is country of origin indicator, not product identity. Its presence/absence does not affect product identity.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' with three specific items prefixed by 'CN -'. Invoice describes goods as 'Telecommunication equipment' in the Goods Marking field, with three line items. Each line item in the certificate exactly matches the corresponding invoice line item description after removing the 'CN -' prefix (which is a country of origin code, not part of the product description). Line 1: 'Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m' = exact match. Line 2: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m' = exact match. Line 3: 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m' = exact match. The general category 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' is a standard abbreviation of 'Telecommunication equipment'. All items verified.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.2.1 - Identify verifying quantity from certificate box 7
comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains: 'G.W 4972,910 KG'. This is the verification-grounding quantity. G.W = Gross Weight. Numeric value: 4972.910. Unit: KG.
comparison_steps.result: Verification quantity identified: 4972.910 KG GW from box 7

comparison_steps.description: Invoice 'Total gross weight' field: '4.972,910 KG'. Need to normalize numeric format. The invoice uses European notation with period as thousands separator and comma as decimal separator: 4.972,910 = 4972.910.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate value 4972.910 KG (GW) matches invoice Total gross weight 4972.910 KG after thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate explicitly states 'G.W' (Gross Weight). Invoice field is explicitly labeled 'Total gross weight'. Same weight category.
comparison_steps.result: GW in certificate matches Gross Weight in invoice

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states only GW in box 7. Invoice also states Total net weight: 3.843,710 KG. Certificate does not claim a NW value, so no contradiction exists.
comparison_steps.result: No contradicting quantities found. Certificate GW verified; NW not claimed by certificate.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification - numeric value 4972.910 found in invoice Total gross weight field
Box 7 value used as verification-grounding quantity
Weight category GW explicitly stated in both certificate and invoice
Thousands separator normalization - period in '4.972,910' recognized as thousands separator in European numeric notation

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'G.W 4972,910 KG'. The comma in '4972,910' is the decimal separator (European notation), giving numeric value 4972.910 KG Gross Weight. Invoice 'Total gross weight' field: '4.972,910 KG'. The period in '4.972,910' is a thousands separator (European notation with period as thousands separator and comma as decimal separator), giving numeric value 4972.910 KG. After normalization per 4.4.3.3, both values are 4972.910 KG. Weight category: certificate states 'G.W' = Gross Weight, invoice field is labeled 'Total gross weight'. Exact match on numeric value, unit, and weight category. Certificate box 6 also mentions '37 PACKAGES' which matches invoice '37 BOXES' (both indicate 37 package units), providing additional corroboration but the primary verification is via box 7 GW.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: CN (CoO column for all three line items)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice. Invoice has a 'CoO' (Country of Origin) column in the line item table. All three line items show 'CN' in the CoO column.
comparison_steps.result: Origin 'CN' explicitly identified in dedicated CoO column for all items

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'CN' in box 3. Invoice states 'CN' in CoO column. Identical ISO code, no normalization needed.
All line items in invoice show same origin 'CN'. Certificate states single origin 'CN'. Unified origin confirmed.
comparison_steps.result: Single origin CN confirmed across all items

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit CoO column in invoice line items
Unified origin - all items show CN
ISO code normalization - CN = CN, exact match

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states origin 'CN' (China). Invoice has an explicit 'CoO' column in the item table where all three line items show 'CN'. This is a dedicated Country of Origin field per 4.5.1. Exact match: CN = CN. No normalization needed. Single unified origin across all items per 4.5.2. Note: origin CN (China) differs from consignor country Sweden — this is entirely valid per 4.5 ('Origin has no connection to consignor's country').

evidence.raw_text: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN
Ericsson AB, VAT No: SE556056625801, Reg.Number:5560566258
VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA
VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA
Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m
Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m

rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate

Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin from West Sweden Chamber of Commerce). Document B is invoice (Customs Invoice 9209875026 from Ericsson AB). Single certificate, single invoice. Straightforward pairing.
Criterion 2 met: Consignor 'Ericsson AB' found in invoice footer. Criterion 3 met: Consignee 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC' found in Invoice to field. Shipment number 7200226916 also matches.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: 'Ericsson AB' found in invoice header branding, footer left block (with VAT), and footer center block (with full address). Direct match — no need to proceed to 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6.
SWEDEN in certificate = SWEDEN in invoice footer + SE prefix in VAT number

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order - Invoice to field
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: Invoice has explicit 'Invoice to' field with VIVA ARMENIA CJSC. This is the authoritative consignee per priority 1.
VIVA ARMENIA CJSC = VIVA ARMENIA CJSC (exact match)

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: All three line items in certificate match exactly with invoice line items after removing 'CN -' prefix (country of origin indicator, not product identity)
Certificate G.W 4972.910 KG matches invoice Total gross weight 4972.910 KG after thousands separator normalization
Invoice uses European notation '4.972,910' where period is thousands separator. Normalized to 4972.910.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country of origin identification in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.reasoning: CN found in explicit CoO column for all three line items
All items show CN. Certificate states single origin CN.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: TELECOM EQUIPMENT vs Telecommunication equipment might be a MISMATCH due to different wording
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The individual line items match exactly, confirming these are the same goods. 'Telecom' is a universally recognized standard abbreviation of 'Telecommunication'. The general category description is consistent with the detailed items. Per 4.3.4, the identity-bearing main designations of each product line are identical.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Different addresses for consignee in certificate (4/1 ARGISHTI STR) vs Ship to in invoice (ARARATYAN ST 62/23) might indicate MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.2.0.2, the 'Invoice to' field has priority over 'Ship to'. The Invoice to field matches the certificate consignee exactly (same name, address, country). Per 4.2.4, address differences in secondary fields do not affect the result when the company name and country match in the primary field.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate quantity '4972,910' might use comma as thousands separator making it 4972910 KG
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In European notation, a single comma within a number with three decimal places (910) is a decimal separator, not a thousands separator. The value 4972.910 KG matches the invoice's 4.972,910 KG (= 4972.910 KG). The value 4972910 KG would be ~5000 metric tons which is inconsistent with 37 packages of telecom equipment.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Ericsson AB i Stockholm kan verifieras mot fakturan, mottagaren Viva Armenia CJSC med adress i Yerevan matchar exakt, varubeskrivningen (telekommunikationsutrustning med tre artikelrader) stämmer överens, bruttovikten 4 972,910 kg bekräftas, och ursprungslandet Kina (CN) anges i båda dokumenten. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

consistency_check.confidence_floor_check: All applicable checkpoints have confidence >= 0.85. Minimum confidence: 0.97 (goods_description). Confidence floor passed.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN (fakturans utställare, identifierad i sidhuvud och sidfot)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — consignor-namnet 'Ericsson AB' identifierades uttryckligen i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot med fullständig adress och VAT-nummer
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'ERICSSON AB' återfinns i fakturans header-branding, i säljarblocket i sidfoten med fullständig adress (Torshamnsgatan 23, S-164 80 STOCKHOLM, SWEDEN) och VAT-nummer SE556056625801. Företagsnamn matchar exakt efter versalnormalisering. Land SWEDEN bekräftas av explicit landangivelse i fakturan och av SE-prefix i VAT-numret.

sections.certificate_value: VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA
sections.invoice_value: VIVA ARMENIA CJSC, 4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA (Invoice to-fältet)
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2) — Invoice to-fältet har prioritet och matchar exakt
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'VIVA ARMENIA CJSC' med adress '4/1 ARGISHTI STR, 0015 YEREVAN, ARMENIA' återfinns exakt i fakturans 'Invoice to'-fält. Företagsnamn, adress och land matchar exakt. Invoice to-fältet har prioritet per 4.2.0.2. Leveransadressen (ARARATYAN ST 62/23) avser en annan fysisk plats men detta påverkar inte bedömningen per 4.2.4.

sections.certificate_value: TELECOM EQUIPMENT: CN - Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m, CN - Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable MQ4(plug)-NEX10(m) 3m, CN - Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable MQ5(plug)-NEX10(m) 3m
sections.invoice_value: Telecommunication equipment: (1) Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m, (2) Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable MQ4(plug)-NEX10(m) 3m, (3) Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable MQ5(plug)-NEX10(m) 3m
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — alla tre artikelrader matchar exakt, 'CN -' prefix är ursprungslandsindikator (4.3.4)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets tre artikelrader (efter borttagning av 'CN -' prefix som är ursprungslandsindikator) matchar exakt med fakturans tre artikelrader: (1) 'Antenna 5700 2L 4M 2.0m', (2) 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ4(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m', (3) 'Kingsignal 1/4" jumper cable, MQ5(plug) - NEX10(m), 3 m'. Den övergripande beteckningen 'TELECOM EQUIPMENT' motsvarar fakturans 'Telecommunication equipment' (vedertagen förkortning).

Certifikatets box 7 anger 'G.W 4972,910 KG' (bruttovikt 4972,910 kg). Fakturans fält 'Total gross weight' anger '4.972,910 KG'. Efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (perioden i '4.972,910' är tusentalsavskiljare i europeiskt format) blir båda värdena 4972,910 kg. Exakt matchning av numeriskt värde, enhet (KG) och viktkategori (Gross Weight).

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering i explicit ursprungsfält (4.5.1) med enhetligt ursprung (4.5.2)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger ursprungsland 'CN' (Kina). Fakturan har en dedikerad 'CoO'-kolumn (Country of Origin) i artikeltabellen där samtliga tre artikelrader anger 'CN'. Exakt matchning av ISO-landskod. Enhetligt ursprung CN för alla varor.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikat SEG-25D-421343 utfärdat av Västsvenska Handelskammaren kan verifieras mot faktura 9209875026 utställd av Ericsson AB. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.
